title: Order Melbourne Pizza Factory - Melbourne, VIC Menu Delivery [Menu & Prices] | Melbourne - DoorDash

faq.question: What is the Melbourne Pizza Factory's address?
faq.answer: Melbourne Pizza Factory is located at House Of Kebabs, 271 King St, Melbourne VIC 3000, Australia. This is where you will go to get DoorDash Pickup orders, and where Dashers will go to get your DoorDash delivery orders.

faq.question: Does Melbourne Pizza Factory offer delivery or pickup?
faq.answer: You can browse Melbourne Pizza Factory’s menu and place an order for Delivery on DoorDash. Melbourne Pizza Factory does not take orders for Pickup on DoorDash at this time. Melbourne Pizza Factory may also offer delivery and pickup on their own or through other delivery services.

faq.question: What are the most popular dishes at Melbourne Pizza Factory?
faq.answer: The dishes most commonly ordered by DoorDash customers at Melbourne Pizza Factory are Pepperonis Traditional Pizza, Margherita Traditional Pizza and Hawaiian Traditional Pizza.

faq.question: Is Melbourne Pizza Factory a DashPass eligible store?
faq.answer: Melbourne Pizza Factory offers DashPass benefits like $0 delivery, reduced service fees, and $5 credits back on Pickup orders. If you want to know if a store is DashPass eligible, you can look for the DashPass icon next to their name.
